name: io.github.sunsiyuan/human-survey
description: Feedback collection for AI agents. Create surveys from JSON schema, share with a group of humans, retrieve structured results via API or MCP.

environmentVariables.name: MTS_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your HumanSurvey API key (starts with mts_sk_). Get one at https://www.humansurvey.co
